description: Extracts code blocks from LLM responses that use markdown formatting. Returns the code content and detected language.

inputs.name: text
inputs.description: The text containing code blocks to extract

inputs.name: return_all
inputs.description: Return all code blocks instead of just the first

inputs.name: language_filter
inputs.description: Only return code blocks matching this language (e.g., 'python', 'javascript')

outputs.name: code
outputs.description: The extracted code. If return_all is true, returns array of code strings.

outputs.name: language
outputs.description: The language tag from the code block (e.g., 'python', 'javascript'), or null if not specified

outputs.name: found
outputs.description: Whether any code blocks were found

outputs.name: blocks
outputs.description: All extracted blocks with code and language (only populated when return_all is true)
